task: Complete a multiplication quiz on https://www.coolmath4kids.com/, covering multiplication facts for 11-12. The quiz should consist of 10 questions, with unlimited time allowed for each. The goal is to achieve a perfect score of 10 out of 10.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the multiplication quiz on Coolmath4Kids with the required settings and achieved a perfect score. Evidence shows it used the direct quiz tool URL on the same site, selected Numbers Covered = 11-12, Total Questions = 10, and Time Per Question = Unlimited. After answering all questions, the final results page visibly showed: 'Multiplication: 11-12, unlimited seconds' and '10 out of 10' with score=10 and scorePercentage=100 in page state. This satisfies the task.
final_result_response: Done. The multiplication quiz was completed with 10 out of 10, using facts for 11-12, 10 questions, and unlimited time.
action_history: Clicking start inside iframe: await quizFrame1.getByRole('button', {name:/Start the Quiz/i}).click();

Opening direct quiz tool: const p2 = await openTab('https://www.coolmath4kids.com/sites/default/files/practice-tool/multiply.html');
Configuring and starting direct quiz: await page.locator('e8').click();
Answering all quiz questions: await page.locator('#userAnswer').fill(ans2);
